title: stelis leptochila
intro: Stelis leptochila, also known as the 'Fragrant Orchid', is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central America and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds in its flowers and roots. The health benefits of Stelis leptochila include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by boiling its roots and flowers to make a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
